title: [A Frozen Battlefield, Trench]
description: A solid wall of ice brings the trench to an abrupt end.  Walls on both sides are slick with frost, and a few deep scratches lend evidence of previous attempted climbs.

wayto.3251:
;e empty_hands
move 'climb south wall'
waitrt?
fill_hands
wayto.3254:
;e empty_hands
move 'climb north wall'
waitrt?
fill_hands
wayto.3260: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'west'
